channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: TabMaster - Fri Jun 12 11:07:26 UTC 2026
item.description:
TabMaster adds smarter bulk close actions to the editor tab context menu. Right-click any open file's tab and you'll find them in the usual close block, right next to...
vendor: Christoph Wagner downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.christophwagner.idea.tabmaster

item.title: Active Tab Color - Fri Jun 12 08:42:50 UTC 2026
item.description:
